scientific_taste.description: Third mechanical PASS via strict-substring. Pattern: when content_words are specific phrases (e.g. 'LLM watermark', 'information theory') the strict substring fails on near-matches (e.g. 'LLM Watermarking', 'Self-Information'). The mechanical rule treats these as misses but they are substantively prior art.

honest_note: Third mechanical PASS via the same strict-substring artifact pattern. The strict word-for-word substring rule is sensitive to morphological variants (LLM watermark vs LLM watermarking, information theory vs Self-Information). The cross-agent verifier catches this substantively.
